languages.text: "Ты знала, что один из пустотников — беглый еретик?"

traits.locale_text: "Ты знала, что один из матросов — беглый преступник?"

languages.text: "Did you know that one of the voidsmen was a fugitive heretic?"
languages.original_text: "Ты знала, что один из пустотников — беглый еретик?"

traits.locale_text: "Did you know that one of the voidfarers was a fugitive heretic?"
"Did you know that one of the voidfarers was a fugitive heretic?"
"Did you know that one of the voidfarers was a fugitive heretic?"
"Did you know that one of the voidsmen was a fugitive heretic?"
"Did you know that one of the voidsmen was a fugitive heretic?"

languages.text: 「クルーの一人が逃亡中の異端者だってことを知っていたのか？」
languages.original_text: "Did you know that one of the voidsmen was a fugitive heretic?"

traits.locale_text: 「クルーの一人が逃亡中の異端者だってことを知っていたのか？」

languages.text: "Uçsuz erlerinden birinin kaçak bir kâfir olduğundan haberdar mıydın?"
languages.original_text: "Did you know that one of the voidsmen was a fugitive heretic?"

traits.locale_text: "Uçsuz erlerinden birinin kaçak bir kâfir olduğundan haberdar mıydın?"

languages.text: «¿Sabía que uno de los infantes del vacío era un hereje fugitivo?».
languages.original_text: "Did you know that one of the voidsmen was a fugitive heretic?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Sabía que uno de los infantes del vacío era un hereje fugitivo?».

languages.text: “你早就知道那个船员是个在逃的异端分子吗？”
languages.original_text: "Did you know that one of the voidsmen was a fugitive heretic?"

traits.locale_text: “你早就知道那个船员是个在逃的异端分子吗？”

languages.text: « Saviez-vous que l'un des cosmomarins était un hérétique en fuite ? »
languages.original_text: "Did you know that one of the voidsmen was a fugitive heretic?"

traits.locale_text: « Saviez-vous que l'un des cosmomarins était un hérétique en fuite ? »

languages.text: "Wusstet Ihr, dass dieser Raumfahrer ein flüchtiger Ketzer war?"
languages.original_text: "Did you know that one of the voidsmen was a fugitive heretic?"

traits.locale_text: "Wusstet Ihr, dass dieser Raumfahrer ein flüchtiger Ketzer war?"
